schema_note: Hybrid agent — Copilot Studio + Power Automate + Azure Function
name: Offboarding Orchestrator
description: Manages the complete employee offboarding lifecycle: account disable, license reclaim, device wipe, mailbox conversion, group removal, manager notification — with approval gates and audit trail.

conversation_starters.text: Offboard John Smith effective today — his manager is Jane Doe
What's the status of the offboarding for jane@contoso.com?
Show me all offboardings completed this month

components.copilot_studio: Conversational interface for initiating and tracking offboardings
components.power_automate: Sequential orchestration of offboarding steps with approval gates
components.azure_function: Batch processing for bulk offboardings (RIF events), parallel Graph calls
